meta.name: cross-border-txns-decline-intelligence
meta.description: Unified taxonomy of payment decline/return codes across 6 rails, mapped to leg, root category, retryability, and operational owner. Built for multi-leg cross-border payment flows.
meta.author: Ankit Beniwal (linkedin.com/in/ankitb-iitd)

rails.iso20022: ISO 20022 ExternalStatusReason codes (pacs.002) — the cross-border spine, used by SWIFT CBPR+, SEPA, FPS, FAST and most modern rails
rails.ach: NACHA ACH return codes (US) — R01-R85 including IAT international codes
rails.upi: NPCI UPI error and response codes (India) — v2.9
rails.fps: UK Faster Payments — ISO 20022 subset post-migration, plus Confirmation of Payee outcomes

codes.native_description: IncorrectAccountNumber — account number is invalid or incorrect
codes.customer_message: The account number provided is invalid. Please verify and re-submit.

codes.native_description: InvalidDebtorAccountNumber — debtor account number invalid or missing
codes.customer_message: Your account details appear invalid. Please check and try again.

codes.native_description: InvalidCreditorAccountNumber — creditor account number invalid or missing
codes.customer_message: The recipient's account number is invalid. Please verify the beneficiary details.

codes.native_description: ClosedAccountNumber — account number specified has been closed
codes.customer_message: The account is closed. A different account is needed to complete this payment.

codes.native_description: ClosedDebtorAccountNumber — debtor account closed
codes.customer_message: The sending account is closed. Please use a different account.

codes.native_description: BlockedAccount — account is blocked, prohibiting posting of transactions
codes.customer_message: The account is currently blocked. Contact the account-holding bank to resolve.

codes.native_description: ClosedCreditorAccountNumber — creditor account closed
codes.customer_message: The recipient's account is closed. Please obtain updated beneficiary details.

codes.native_description: TransactionForbidden — transaction forbidden on this type of account
codes.customer_message: This account type does not permit this kind of payment.

codes.native_description: InvalidBankOperationCode — operation/transaction code incorrect or invalid
codes.customer_message: A technical issue occurred. Our team is on it — no action needed from you.

codes.native_description: ZeroAmount — specified amount is zero
codes.customer_message: The payment amount was invalid. Please re-submit with a valid amount.

codes.native_description: NotAllowedAmount — amount exceeds allowed limit
codes.customer_message: The amount exceeds the permitted limit for this payment route.

codes.native_description: NotAllowedCurrency — specified currency not allowed
codes.customer_message: This currency is not supported on this payment route.

codes.native_description: InsufficientFunds — amount of funds available to cover specified message amount is insufficient
codes.customer_message: Insufficient funds. Please top up your account and retry.

codes.native_description: Duplication — duplicate payment
codes.customer_message: This payment was flagged as a duplicate. If you intended a second payment, re-submit with a new reference.

codes.native_description: TooLowAmount — specified transaction amount is less than agreed minimum
codes.customer_message: The amount is below the minimum for this payment route.

codes.native_description: BlockedAmount — amount specified has been blocked by regulatory authorities
codes.customer_message: This payment is on hold pending a regulatory check.

codes.native_description: WrongAmount — amount received is not the amount agreed or expected
codes.customer_message: There was an amount mismatch on this payment. Our team is investigating.

codes.native_description: InconsistentWithEndCustomer — identification of end customer is not consistent with associated account number
codes.customer_message: The recipient name does not match the account. Please verify beneficiary details.

codes.native_description: MissingCreditorAddress — specification of creditor's address is missing or incorrect
codes.customer_message: The recipient's address is missing or incomplete. Please update and retry.

codes.native_description: UnknownEndCustomer — end customer specified is not known at associated sort/branch code
codes.customer_message: The recipient could not be identified at the destination bank.

codes.native_description: MissingDebtorAddress — specification of debtor's address is missing or incorrect
codes.customer_message: Your address details are missing or incomplete. Please update your profile.

codes.native_description: CreditorBankIsNotRegistered — creditor bank not registered under this BIC in the CSM
codes.customer_message: The destination bank is not reachable on this payment route.

codes.native_description: DebtorBankIsNotRegistered — debtor bank not registered under this BIC in the CSM
codes.customer_message: The sending bank is not reachable on this payment route.

codes.native_description: RequestedByCustomer — cancellation requested by the debtor
codes.customer_message: This payment was cancelled at the sender's request.

codes.native_description: InvalidDate — invalid date (e.g. wrong or missing settlement date)
codes.customer_message: A scheduling issue occurred with this payment. Our team is fixing it.

codes.native_description: DuplicatePayment — payment is a duplicate of another payment
codes.customer_message: This payment was identified as a duplicate and stopped for your protection.

codes.native_description: InvalidFileFormat — file format incomplete or invalid
codes.customer_message: A technical formatting issue occurred. Our team is on it.

codes.native_description: FollowingCancellationRequest — return following a cancellation request
codes.customer_message: This payment was returned following a cancellation request.

codes.native_description: FraudulentOrigin — fraudulent originated payment
codes.customer_message: This payment could not be processed. Please contact support for assistance.

codes.native_description: EndCustomerDeceased — end customer is deceased
codes.customer_message: This payment could not be completed. Please contact support.

codes.native_description: NotSpecifiedReasonCustomerGenerated — reason not specified by end customer
codes.customer_message: The payment was declined by the account holder without a stated reason.

codes.native_description: NotSpecifiedReasonAgentGenerated — reason not specified by agent
codes.customer_message: The bank declined this payment without a stated reason. We are following up.

codes.native_description: Narrative — reason given in free-text narrative field
codes.customer_message: The bank provided additional details on this decline. Our team is reviewing.

codes.native_description: BankIdentifierIncorrect — bank identifier code is invalid or missing
codes.customer_message: The bank code (BIC/routing) is invalid. Please verify and retry.

codes.native_description: InvalidDebtorBankIdentifier — debtor bank identifier invalid or missing
codes.customer_message: Your bank's identifier is invalid. Please verify your bank details.

codes.native_description: InvalidCreditorBankIdentifier — creditor bank identifier invalid or missing
codes.customer_message: The recipient bank's identifier is invalid. Please verify beneficiary bank details.

codes.native_description: MissingDebtorAccountOrIdentification — regulatory: debtor account or identification missing
codes.customer_message: Additional sender identification is required by regulation. Please complete your profile.

codes.native_description: MissingDebtorNameOrAddress — regulatory: debtor name or address missing
codes.customer_message: Regulation requires the sender's full name and address. Please update your details.

codes.native_description: MissingCreditorNameOrAddress — regulatory: creditor name or address missing
codes.customer_message: Regulation requires the recipient's full name and address. Please update beneficiary details.

codes.native_description: RegulatoryReason — generic regulatory reason
codes.customer_message: This payment is held for a regulatory check. We will update you shortly.

codes.native_description: InvalidCutOffTime — payment received after agreed cut-off time
codes.customer_message: The payment missed today's processing window and will be retried in the next one.

codes.native_description: Insufficient Funds — available balance is not sufficient to cover the debit entry
codes.customer_message: Insufficient funds. The debit can be retried — please ensure funds are available.

codes.native_description: Account Closed — previously active account has been closed
codes.customer_message: The account is closed. A different account is needed.

codes.native_description: No Account / Unable to Locate Account — account number structure valid but doesn't match any account
codes.customer_message: The account could not be found. Please verify the account number.

codes.native_description: Invalid Account Number Structure — account number fails format validation
codes.customer_message: The account number format is invalid. Please verify and re-submit.

codes.native_description: Unauthorized Debit to Consumer Account Using Corporate SEC Code
codes.customer_message: This debit was not authorized for a consumer account and has been returned.

codes.native_description: Returned per ODFI's Request — originating bank requested return
codes.customer_message: This payment was recalled. Our team will follow up with details.

codes.native_description: Authorization Revoked by Customer — consumer revoked prior authorization
codes.customer_message: The account holder revoked authorization for this debit.

codes.native_description: Payment Stopped — receiver placed a stop payment order
codes.customer_message: A stop-payment order blocked this transaction.

codes.native_description: Uncollected Funds — sufficient ledger balance but funds not yet collected/available
codes.customer_message: Funds were not yet available. The payment will be retried.

codes.native_description: Customer Advises Originator is Not Known/Authorized — unauthorized debit claim
codes.customer_message: The account holder reported this debit as unauthorized.

codes.native_description: Customer Advises Entry Not in Accordance with Authorization — error in the debit terms
codes.customer_message: The debit didn't match its authorization terms. It can be corrected and re-originated.

codes.native_description: Branch Sold to Another DFI — account at a branch sold to another institution
codes.customer_message: The bank branch has changed institutions. Updated account routing is needed.

codes.native_description: Invalid ACH Routing Number — entry contains an invalid receiving DFI routing number
codes.customer_message: The routing number is invalid. Please verify the bank details.

codes.native_description: Representative Payee Deceased — representative payee deceased or unable to continue
codes.customer_message: This payment could not be completed. Please contact support.

codes.native_description: Beneficiary or Account Holder Deceased
codes.customer_message: This payment could not be completed. Please contact support.

codes.native_description: Account Frozen / Entry Returned per OFAC Instruction
codes.customer_message: The account is frozen and cannot receive this payment. Please contact support.

codes.native_description: File Record Edit Criteria — entry with invalid fields or flagged questionable by RDFI
codes.customer_message: A formatting issue occurred on this payment. Our team is correcting it.

codes.native_description: Non-Transaction Account — account does not accept ACH entries (e.g. savings restrictions)
codes.customer_message: This account type cannot receive this payment. A different account is needed.

codes.native_description: Invalid Company Identification — company ID in the entry is not valid
codes.customer_message: A sender identification issue occurred. Our team is fixing it.

codes.native_description: Invalid Individual ID Number — receiver's ID number is not valid
codes.customer_message: The recipient's ID reference is invalid. Please verify beneficiary details.

codes.native_description: Credit Entry Refused by Receiver — receiver refused the credit (e.g. wrong amount, duplicate)
codes.customer_message: The recipient declined this payment. Please confirm details with them and re-send.

codes.native_description: Duplicate Entry — entry is a duplicate of a previously processed transaction
codes.customer_message: This payment was flagged as a duplicate and stopped for your protection.

codes.native_description: Corporate Customer Advises Not Authorized — corporate receiver claims debit not authorized
codes.customer_message: The business account holder reported this debit as unauthorized.

codes.native_description: Permissible Return Entry — RDFI returning a CCD/CTX with ODFI agreement
codes.customer_message: This payment was returned by agreement between the banks.

codes.native_description: IAT Entry Coding Error — international ACH entry has invalid coding
codes.customer_message: A coding issue occurred on this international payment. Our team is correcting it.

codes.native_description: Non-Participant in IAT Program — receiving bank not part of the international ACH program
codes.customer_message: The destination bank cannot receive international ACH payments. An alternate route is needed.

codes.native_description: Invalid Foreign Receiving DFI Identification — foreign bank identifier invalid
codes.customer_message: The destination bank's identifier is invalid. Please verify the bank details.

codes.native_description: Foreign Receiving DFI Unable to Settle — foreign bank cannot settle the entry
codes.customer_message: The destination bank could not settle this payment. It will be retried or re-routed.

codes.native_description: Entry Not Processed by Gateway — IAT entry not processed by the gateway operator
codes.customer_message: An intermediary processing issue occurred. The payment will be retried.

codes.native_description: Incorrectly Coded Outbound International Payment — outbound IAT miscoded
codes.customer_message: A coding issue occurred on this international payment. Our team is correcting it.

codes.native_description: Net debit cap exceeded — remitter bank exceeded its NPCI net debit cap
codes.customer_message: Your bank has hit a temporary system limit. Please retry in a few minutes.

codes.native_description: ReqAuth timeout — authorization request timed out before customer responded
codes.customer_message: The approval request timed out. Please retry and approve promptly.

codes.native_description: Risk threshold exceeded — transaction blocked by risk rules
codes.customer_message: This payment could not be processed. Please contact support for assistance.

codes.native_description: PSP is not registered — payment service provider not registered with NPCI
codes.customer_message: A configuration issue occurred. Our team is on it.

codes.native_description: PSP not available — remitter/beneficiary bank systems are down
codes.customer_message: The bank's systems are temporarily unavailable. Please retry shortly.

codes.native_description: Address resolution failure — virtual address (VPA) could not be resolved
codes.customer_message: The UPI ID could not be found. Please check the UPI ID and retry.

codes.native_description: Debit has failed — debit leg failed at the remitter bank
codes.customer_message: Your bank could not complete the debit. Please retry; any debited amount auto-reverses.

codes.native_description: Credit has failed — credit leg failed at the beneficiary bank
codes.customer_message: The recipient's bank could not receive the payment. It will be retried or auto-reversed.

codes.native_description: Debit acknowledgement not received from PSP
codes.customer_message: A confirmation delay occurred. The payment status will update shortly.

codes.native_description: Transaction ID mismatch between request and response
codes.customer_message: A technical mismatch occurred. Our team is investigating.

codes.native_description: Device fingerprint mismatch — device binding check failed
codes.customer_message: Your device could not be verified. Please re-register your device in the UPI app.

codes.native_description: Debit timeout — debit request to remitter bank timed out
codes.customer_message: The bank took too long to respond. Please retry; any debit auto-reverses.

codes.native_description: Credit timeout — credit request to beneficiary bank timed out
codes.customer_message: The recipient's bank took too long to respond. The payment will be retried or reversed.

codes.native_description: Collect request expired — payer did not approve within the validity window
codes.customer_message: The payment request expired. Please initiate a fresh request.

codes.native_description: Received late response — response arrived after timeout window
codes.customer_message: A delayed response caused this payment to fail. Please retry.

codes.native_description: Connection timeout in ReqPay — network failure between UPI entities
codes.customer_message: A network issue interrupted the payment. Please retry.

codes.native_description: Insufficient funds in customer account
codes.customer_message: Insufficient balance. Please top up your account and retry.

codes.native_description: Transaction declined by customer — payer rejected the collect request
codes.customer_message: You declined this payment request.

codes.native_description: Validation error — request failed field validation at the bank
codes.customer_message: A validation issue occurred. Please retry; our team has been notified.

codes.native_description: Invalid MPIN — UPI PIN entered is incorrect
codes.customer_message: Incorrect UPI PIN. Please retry with the correct PIN.

codes.native_description: Invalid OTP — one-time password entered is incorrect
codes.customer_message: Incorrect OTP. Please retry with the correct code.

codes.native_description: OTP expired — one-time password validity elapsed
codes.customer_message: The OTP expired. Please request a new one and retry.

codes.native_description: Inactive or dormant account
codes.customer_message: The account is inactive. Please contact your bank to reactivate it.

codes.native_description: Invalid transaction at remitter side
codes.customer_message: Your bank rejected this transaction type. Please contact your bank.

codes.native_description: Invalid transaction at beneficiary side
codes.customer_message: The recipient's bank rejected this transaction type.

codes.native_description: Invalid amount at remitter side
codes.customer_message: The amount was invalid for this payment. Please retry.

codes.native_description: Format error at remitter side
codes.customer_message: A formatting issue occurred. Our team is on it.

codes.native_description: Account does not exist at remitter side
codes.customer_message: The linked account could not be found. Please re-link your bank account.

codes.native_description: Transaction not permitted to account at remitter side
codes.customer_message: Your account type does not permit this payment.

codes.native_description: Remitter CBS offline — sending bank's core banking system unavailable
codes.customer_message: Your bank's systems are temporarily down. Please retry shortly.

codes.native_description: Beneficiary CBS offline — receiving bank's core banking system unavailable
codes.customer_message: The recipient's bank systems are temporarily down. Please retry shortly.

codes.native_description: Suspected fraud / declined based on risk score by remitter bank
codes.customer_message: This payment could not be processed. Please contact support for assistance.

codes.native_description: Lost or stolen instrument
codes.customer_message: This payment instrument has been blocked. Please contact your bank.

codes.native_description: Refer to card issuer — issuer wants direct contact before approving
codes.customer_message: Your bank needs to verify this payment. Please contact your card issuer, then retry.

codes.native_description: Invalid merchant — merchant ID invalid or not permitted
codes.customer_message: A merchant configuration issue occurred. Our team is fixing it.

codes.native_description: Pick up card — issuer requests card retention (no fraud implied)
codes.customer_message: This card cannot be used. Please contact your bank or use a different card.

codes.native_description: Do not honor — generic issuer decline (risk rules, temporary block, or unspecified)
codes.customer_message: Your bank declined this payment without a specific reason. Contact your bank or try another card.

codes.native_description: Error — general error at issuer
codes.customer_message: A temporary error occurred at your bank. Please retry.

codes.native_description: Invalid transaction — transaction type not allowed for this card/merchant combination
codes.customer_message: This transaction type isn't supported for this card. Please try a different payment method.

codes.native_description: Invalid amount — amount field invalid or exceeds permitted range
codes.customer_message: The payment amount was invalid. Please retry.

codes.native_description: Invalid account number — no such card number at issuer
codes.customer_message: The card number appears invalid. Please check and re-enter your card details.

codes.native_description: No such issuer — card number prefix doesn't match any issuer
codes.customer_message: The card number appears invalid. Please check and re-enter your card details.

codes.native_description: Format error — message failed format validation
codes.customer_message: A technical formatting issue occurred. Our team is on it.

codes.native_description: Lost card — card reported lost
codes.customer_message: This card has been blocked. Please use a different card.

codes.native_description: Stolen card — card reported stolen
codes.customer_message: This card has been blocked. Please use a different card.

codes.native_description: Closed account (Mastercard) — account closed by issuer or cardholder
codes.customer_message: This card account is closed. Please use a different card.

codes.native_description: Insufficient funds — balance/credit limit cannot cover the amount
codes.customer_message: Insufficient funds on this card. Please top up or use another card.

codes.native_description: Expired card
codes.customer_message: This card has expired. Please use a current card.

codes.native_description: Incorrect PIN
codes.customer_message: Incorrect PIN. Please retry with the correct PIN.

codes.native_description: Transaction not permitted to cardholder — card not enabled for this transaction type (e.g. international/online disabled)
codes.customer_message: Your card isn't enabled for this type of payment. Enable international/online transactions in your banking app and retry.

codes.native_description: Transaction not permitted to terminal — merchant not allowed this transaction type
codes.customer_message: A merchant configuration issue occurred. Our team is fixing it.

codes.native_description: Suspected fraud — issuer risk systems flagged the transaction
codes.customer_message: This payment could not be processed. Please contact your bank or use a different card.

codes.native_description: Exceeds withdrawal amount limit
codes.customer_message: This payment exceeds your card limit. Adjust your limit in your banking app or use another card.

codes.native_description: Restricted card — card blocked for this merchant category or country (can include sanctions geo-blocks)
codes.customer_message: This card is restricted for this type of payment. Please use a different card.

codes.native_description: Security violation — security rules breached (e.g. CVV mismatch handling per network)
codes.customer_message: A security check failed. Please verify your card details and retry.

codes.native_description: Exceeds withdrawal frequency limit (Visa: may also signal strong customer authentication required)
codes.customer_message: Your card has hit a usage limit, or additional authentication is required. Please retry with verification.

codes.native_description: Allowable number of PIN tries exceeded
codes.customer_message: Too many incorrect PIN attempts. The card is temporarily locked — contact your bank.

codes.native_description: Blocked, first use (Visa) — new card not yet activated
codes.customer_message: This card hasn't been activated yet. Activate it with your bank, then retry.

codes.native_description: Negative CAM, dCVV, iCVV or CVV results — card verification data mismatch
codes.customer_message: The card security code didn't match. Please re-enter your card details.

codes.native_description: Issuer unavailable or switch inoperative — issuer systems down
codes.customer_message: Your bank's systems are temporarily unavailable. Please retry shortly.

codes.native_description: Unable to route transaction — destination cannot be found for routing
codes.customer_message: A routing issue occurred. Please retry shortly.

codes.native_description: Transaction cannot be completed, violation of law
codes.customer_message: This payment cannot be completed due to a regulatory restriction.

codes.native_description: Duplicate transmission — transaction already submitted
codes.customer_message: This payment was flagged as a duplicate and stopped for your protection.

codes.native_description: System malfunction — processing error at issuer or network
codes.customer_message: A temporary system error occurred. Please retry shortly.

codes.native_description: Decline for CVV2 failure (Visa)
codes.customer_message: The card security code (CVV) didn't match. Please re-enter your card details.

codes.native_description: IncorrectAccountNumber — sort code/account number fails validation (FPS ISO 20022)
codes.customer_message: The UK account number or sort code is invalid. Please verify beneficiary details.

codes.native_description: ClosedAccountNumber — UK beneficiary account closed
codes.customer_message: The recipient's UK account is closed. Updated account details are needed.

codes.native_description: BlockedAccount — UK beneficiary account blocked
codes.customer_message: The recipient's account is blocked. They should contact their bank.

codes.native_description: TransactionForbidden — account does not accept Faster Payments
codes.customer_message: The recipient's account cannot receive Faster Payments. An alternate route is needed.

codes.native_description: Duplication — duplicate FPS payment detected
codes.customer_message: This payment was flagged as a duplicate and stopped for your protection.

codes.native_description: InconsistentWithEndCustomer — beneficiary name inconsistent with account
codes.customer_message: The recipient name doesn't match the account. Please verify beneficiary details.

codes.native_description: RequestedByCustomer — recall/cancellation requested by sender
codes.customer_message: This payment was cancelled at the sender's request.

codes.native_description: DuplicatePayment — payment is a duplicate
codes.customer_message: This payment was identified as a duplicate and stopped.

codes.native_description: FraudulentOrigin — payment flagged as fraudulent (UK APP fraud controls)
codes.customer_message: This payment could not be processed. Please contact support.

codes.native_description: EndCustomerDeceased — beneficiary deceased
codes.customer_message: This payment could not be completed. Please contact support.

codes.native_description: BankIdentifierIncorrect — sort code invalid or not FPS-reachable
codes.customer_message: The UK sort code is invalid or unreachable. Please verify the bank details.

codes.native_description: RegulatoryReason — held or rejected for UK regulatory reasons
codes.customer_message: This payment is held for a regulatory check. We will update you shortly.

codes.native_description: InvalidCutOffTime — received after processing window
codes.customer_message: The payment missed today's window and will be processed in the next one.

codes.native_description: Confirmation of Payee: Account Name No Match — supplied name does not match account name
codes.customer_message: The recipient name doesn't match the account name at their bank. Please verify before re-sending.

codes.native_description: Confirmation of Payee: Partial Account Name Match — close but not exact match
codes.customer_message: The recipient name is a close but not exact match. Please confirm the exact registered name.

codes.native_description: IncorrectAccountNumber — SG account number fails validation (FAST ISO 20022)
codes.customer_message: The Singapore account number is invalid. Please verify beneficiary details.

codes.native_description: InvalidCreditorAccountNumber — SG beneficiary account invalid
codes.customer_message: The recipient's account number is invalid. Please verify and retry.

codes.native_description: ClosedAccountNumber — SG beneficiary account closed
codes.customer_message: The recipient's account is closed. Updated account details are needed.

codes.native_description: BlockedAccount — SG beneficiary account blocked
codes.customer_message: The recipient's account is blocked. They should contact their bank.

codes.native_description: TransactionForbidden — account does not accept FAST transfers
codes.customer_message: The recipient's account cannot receive FAST transfers. An alternate route is needed.

codes.native_description: NotAllowedAmount — exceeds FAST transaction limit (SGD 200,000)
codes.customer_message: The amount exceeds the FAST limit. The payment will be split or re-routed via MEPS+.

codes.native_description: InsufficientFunds — settlement account has insufficient funds
codes.customer_message: A temporary funding issue delayed this payment. It will be retried shortly.

codes.native_description: Duplication — duplicate FAST payment detected
codes.customer_message: This payment was flagged as a duplicate and stopped for your protection.

codes.native_description: InconsistentWithEndCustomer — beneficiary name inconsistent with account
codes.customer_message: The recipient name doesn't match the account. Please verify beneficiary details.

codes.native_description: DuplicatePayment — payment is a duplicate
codes.customer_message: This payment was identified as a duplicate and stopped.

codes.native_description: InvalidFileFormat — message fails FAST format validation
codes.customer_message: A technical formatting issue occurred. Our team is on it.

codes.native_description: FraudulentOrigin — payment flagged by fraud controls
codes.customer_message: This payment could not be processed. Please contact support.

codes.native_description: BankIdentifierIncorrect — SG bank code invalid or not FAST participant
codes.customer_message: The Singapore bank code is invalid or not reachable on FAST. Please verify bank details.

codes.native_description: RegulatoryReason — held or rejected for MAS regulatory reasons
codes.customer_message: This payment is held for a regulatory check. We will update you shortly.

codes.native_description: InvalidCutOffTime — received after processing window
codes.customer_message: The payment missed the current window and will be processed in the next one.
